name: Yeltsin Batiancila
summary: Full Stack Developer with 9 years of focused experience in Laravel, PHP, and database engineering. I build scalable RESTful APIs and complex multi-tenant SaaS platforms, with a strong eye for performance and clean architecture. My work spans SaaS, e-commerce, SEO tooling, government systems, and quality control platforms, covering everything from backend architecture and payment integrations to polished frontends built with Vue, React, and Filament. I care about shipping code that holds up under real production load.

skill_groups.label: Languages
skill_groups.items: PHP, JavaScript, HTML, CSS, jQuery, Ajax

skill_groups.label: Specialty
skill_groups.items: Custom REST APIs, Payment Gateways, Multi-tenant SaaS, Subscription Billing

projects.title: 2friends · Encrypted Cloud Storage & Referral SaaS
projects.description: Subscription SaaS combining encrypted cloud storage (Briefcase, 1TB across 10 devices) with a 12-level cashback referral network. Built the network ledger, payout logic, GDPR-compliant flows, and country-based VAT handling.

projects.title: PRINTOS · Multi-tenant Printing Business Suite
projects.description: Multi-tenant Laravel SaaS built solo from the ground up. Handles orders, products, materials, inventory, production scheduling, and analytics for printing businesses.

projects.title: Cannabrands · Cannabis SaaS Platform
projects.description: Wholesale and retail SaaS for the cannabis industry. Full admin CRUD, CRM, ordering, invoices, products, lab, and BOM. Implemented dual-side marketplace with cart, search, and brand presentation.

projects.title: SEOData.io · SEO API and Web App
projects.description: Built on Apiato and Laravel. Multiple external API integrations, credit-based subscriptions, payment processing, credential management, and full frontend dashboard.

projects.title: KeywordTracker.net · SERP Crawler
projects.description: Domain ranking tracker with custom crawler service, Filament admin, subscriptions, and Stripe payments. Tracks rank history, competitors, and SERP features.

employment.company: Dept. of Social Welfare and Development PH

projects.title: NHTS · National Household Targeting System
projects.description: Government application assisting field staff in monitoring household targeting activities. Tracks visit logs, eligibility assessments, and case management workflows.

projects.title: Worldwide Quality Control
projects.description: Audit, quality inspection, and laboratory testing booking platform. Full backend and frontend implementation including multi-site scheduling and lab sample workflows.

projects.title: Venus Awards · UK Business Women Awards
projects.description: End-to-end awards platform covering nominations, eligibility, applications, sponsorship, and a multi-stage judging module with weighted scoring.
